rules: NEVER use generic fonts (Inter, Roboto) for headings.
Overlines must be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Never use pure black or grey; always use slate (blue-tinted grey).
Color is for function only. 95% of UI is monochrome.
Ensure buttons have explicit hover colors (e.g., hover:bg-blue-800 hover:text-white).

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing philosophy but dense for data grids (p-4 to p-6 inside cards). Standardize on Tailwind scale.
rules: Base dashboard grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding.
Grid children must be direct children. Avoid wrapping items unnecessarily.

header.style: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (border-b border-slate-200). Never transparent.
header.behavior: Sticky z-50 with solid background to prevent data refraction.

cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), NO SHADOW by default.
cards.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-lg) with border darkening.

data_tables.style: Compact, zebra striping optional, horizontal and vertical scrolling with fixed headers. Border-collapse.
data_tables.interaction: Inline actions, sticky first column, hover row highlight (hover:bg-slate-50).

forms.style: Shadcn based. Inputs with sharp borders, subtle focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-800/20).

icons.usage: Use for dense dashboards. Weight: regular or bold depending on emphasis.

images.description: Raffles University minimal blue crest logo. Use in Header and Auth Screens.
images.usage_instructions: Place in top-left navigation. Max height: 40px.

images.description: Abstract minimalist background for login page.
images.usage_instructions: Use as a full-bleed cover image on the left/right split panel of the authentication view.
Can be used as a banner image in the student or admission portals.
Use for placeholder profile images in the CRM.

rules: Never use placeholder image services (via.placeholder.com etc). Use ONLY the URLs provided above.
Images should use max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none on mobile.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements MUST have explicitly defined hover text and background colors.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). Exclude generic 'all'.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add data-testid to all interactive components.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS: Outfit and IBM Plex Sans.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid' for the main dashboard: dense, highly functional.
Ensure the header uses solid background (no glassmorphism) for data clarity.
Apply data-testid attributes extensively for testability.
Tables should handle complex data: use Shadcn Table with fixed headers and dense row styling.
Adhere strictly to the color palette: mostly monochrome slate, with specific semantic accents.
